title: Subfield/Subindex Local Annotation Support
body:
Add the ability to read in and represent subfield/subindex _local_ annotations. These should be stored on the declaration they're associated with as opposed to on every subfield/subindex expression. These need to be properly split up during passes like `LowerTypes`.

As an example, the following FIRRTL snippet has an annotation on `bar[1].baz`:

```scala
circuit Foo: %[[{"a":null,"target":"~Foo|Foo>bar[1].baz"}]]
  module Foo:
    wire bar: {baz: UInt<1>, qux: UInt<1>}[2]
```

This should be represented as an attribute on the `%bar = firrtl.wire` declaration when parsed in. An example representation could be something like:

```mlir
firrtl.circuit "Foo" {
  firrtl.module @Foo() {
    %bar = firrtl.wire {annotations = [{a, target = ["[1]", ".baz"]}]} : !firrtl.vector<bundle<baz: uint<1>, qux: uint<1>>, 2>
  }
}
```

After running `LowerTypes`, this should be properly split up and only associated with one ground type:

```mlir
firrtl.circuit "Foo" {
  firrtl.module @Foo() {
    %bar_0_baz = firrtl.wire  : !firrtl.uint<1>
    %bar_0_qux = firrtl.wire  : !firrtl.uint<1>
    %bar_1_baz = firrtl.wire {annotations = [{a}]}  : !firrtl.uint<1>
    %bar_1_qux = firrtl.wire  : !firrtl.uint<1>
  }
}
```

### Background

FIRRTL supports metadata attached to specific targets in the circuit. Roughly, _targets_ are strings used to identify specific things in a circuit of the form:

```
“~” (circuit) (“|” (module) (“/” (instance) “:” (module) )* (“>” (ref) )?)?
```

A local annotation has no hierarchical path to it's reference, i.e., no `"/" (instance) ":" (module)` stuff.

A ref can either be a single name string or it can include subfield/subindex modifiers after it like:

```
(name) ("[" (index) "]" | "." (field))*
```

Example:

```scala
// "In circuit 'Foo'", "Module 'Bar'", "thing named 'baz'", "index zero", "field 'qux'"
~Foo|Bar>baz[0].qux
```

#### Prior Patches

- #616 adds support for `CircuitTarget` and `ModuleTarget` annotations. 
- #823 adds support for local `ReferenceTarget` annotations that include no subfield/subindex modifiers. These annotations are read in and stored as attributes on the appropriate operand.
